modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble logging into D2L due to CAS authorization error.

full_description_text:
- So, I was just trying to log into D2L, you know, the online learning platform we use for classes. 
- Everything was going fine until I hit the login button, and bam! I got this error message saying, "Application not authorized to use CAS." 
- It's super frustrating because I really need to access my course materials, and I thought CAS was supposed to make logging in easier, not harder! 
- I’m not sure if it’s a glitch or something else, but I just wanted to get into my account without any hassle.
